texto: The language we use can subtly influence our thinking. […]On the face of it, the term “web platform” seems harmless. Describing the web as a platform puts it on par with other software environments. Flash was a platform. Android is a platform. iOS is a platform. But the web is not a platform. The whole point of the web is that it is cross‐platform.
explicacao: Citação de Jeremy Keith sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The language we use can subtly influence our thinking. […]On the face of it, the term “web platfo…” articula reflexao, language, platform em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como platform e web.
